title: Organic Cacao from the Amazon
body: [![coamacacao.com](http://farm2.static.flickr.com/1096/5125737112_6543676170.jpg "coamacacao.com")](http://www.coamacacao.com) Another small, low-budget website. [Organic Cacao from the Amazon](http://www.coamacacao.com/ "Organic Cacao from the Amazon"). In this case, I did choose WordPress, to which I added the WPML plugin to create a multilingual site. Although it is not a blog (it has no regular posts or comments), I decided to build it with WordPress because I believe it is a very good Content Management System. I designed the theme (template) from scratch. This is the result. [coamacacao.com](http://www.coamacacao.com/ "Organic Cacao from the Amazon")
